# CWE-184 positive: incomplete disallowed keyword list (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-184-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

var forbidden = []string{"drop", "delete"}

// CWE-184 Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs
// Vulnerable line: blocklist misses uppercase and synonym verbs.
func FilterStatement(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	clause := strings.ToLower(r.FormValue("clause"))
	for _, word := range forbidden {
		if strings.Contains(clause, word) {
			http.Error(w, "blocked", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"accepted": clause})
}
